case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT; DISCHARGE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL: GRANTED; NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-22-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,135.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
